```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Many undocumented workers are on the front lines of the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "Undocumented workers harvest food, staff hospitals and nursing homes, and provide essential services.",
    "Undocumented agricultural and farmworkers in California are in need of additional protections during the COVID-19 crisis.",
    "Farmworkers live and work in crowded conditions that make them uniquely vulnerable to COVID-19.",
    "Urgent legislation is needed to keep farmworkers safe during the pandemic.",
    "The five-bill 'California Farmworker COVID-19 Relief Package' proposes to expand paid sick leave for farmworkers.",
    "The 'California Farmworker COVID-19 Relief Package' includes provisions for supplemental hazard pay for farmworkers.",
    "The package aims to fund an outreach campaign to educate farmworkers on personal protection practices.",
    "The 'California Farmworker COVID-19 Relief Package' seeks to help expedite temporary housing to mitigate overcrowding.",
    "The package includes a tax credit for farmers who offer overtime work to their workers."
```
